task_completion.description: Verify that the WooCommerce plugin has been activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'WooCommerce' and 'Products' in the left-hand WordPress admin sidebar, or check the Plugins page to see WooCommerce marked as 'Active' or showing a 'Deactivate' link.

task_completion.description: Verify that the store currency is set to United States Dollar (USD).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the WooCommerce Settings page (General tab). The 'Currency' dropdown should be set to 'United States Dollar ($)'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the product category 'Artisan Coffee Blends' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Products -> Categories page. 'Artisan Coffee Blends' should be listed in the categories table.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Ethiopian Yirgacheffe' product is published with the correct price, SKU, and category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Products list page. 'Ethiopian Yirgacheffe' should be visible with SKU 'ACB-ETH-001', Price '$18.99', Category 'Artisan Coffee Blends', and the status should indicate it is Published (not a Draft).

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Colombian Supremo' product is published with the correct price, SKU, and category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Products list page. 'Colombian Supremo' should be visible with SKU 'ACB-COL-002', Price '$15.49', Category 'Artisan Coffee Blends', and the status should indicate it is Published (not a Draft).

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Sumatra Mandheling' product is published with the correct price, SKU, and category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Products list page. 'Sumatra Mandheling' should be visible with SKU 'ACB-SUM-003', Price '$16.99', Category 'Artisan Coffee Blends', and the status should indicate it is Published (not a Draft).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the WordPress Admin GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web browser navigating the WordPress dashboard (/wp-admin/), rather than a terminal window using WP-CLI or database commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should be visible and show the correct local or remote URL for the WordPress site, not a local file path (file://).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no open browser developer tools (Elements/Console tabs) used to temporarily alter the text on the screen to match the expected products or settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Currency: USD (United States Dollar). Expected Category: 'Artisan Coffee Blends'. Expected Products: 1. 'Ethiopian Yirgacheffe' (Price: 18.99, SKU: ACB-ETH-001), 2. 'Colombian Supremo' (Price: 15.49, SKU: ACB-COL-002), 3. 'Sumatra Mandheling' (Price: 16.99, SKU: ACB-SUM-003). All products must be published and assigned to the 'Artisan Coffee Blends' category.
